requirement_topic.en: Upholstery Flammability — No UK-Style National Mandatory Furniture Fire Standard
requirement_topic.zh: 软垫阻燃性——无英国式全国强制家具防火标准
requirement_topic.zht: 軟墊阻燃性——無英國式全國強制家具防火標準

summary.en: IMPORTANT FLAG — Australia does not have a UK-style national mandatory flammability regime for ordinary domestic upholstered furniture equivalent to the UK Furniture and Furnishings (Fire Safety) Regulations. Upholstered furniture must still be safe under Australian Consumer Law, and buyers, hotels, care facilities, public projects or state/territory fire-safety specifications may require testing to standards such as AS/NZS 4088.1, AS/NZS 4088.2, ISO 8191, BS 5852, or California TB117-2013. Those are technical or contractual routes unless a specific law, project specification, or regulated use makes them binding.
summary.zh: 重要提示——澳大利亚没有针对普通家用软垫家具、等同于英国《家具及装饰品（防火安全）条例》的英国式全国强制阻燃制度。软垫家具仍须符合澳大利亚消费者法下的安全义务，买方、酒店、护理机构、公共项目或州/领地消防安全规范可能要求按AS/NZS 4088.1、AS/NZS 4088.2、ISO 8191、BS 5852或California TB117-2013等标准测试。除非特定法律、项目规范或受监管用途将其强制化，否则这些标准属于技术或合同路径。
summary.zht: 重要提示——澳洲沒有針對普通家用軟墊家具、等同於英國《家具及裝飾品（防火安全）條例》的英國式全國強制阻燃制度。軟墊家具仍須符合澳洲消費者法下的安全義務，買方、酒店、護理機構、公共項目或州/領地消防安全規範可能要求按AS/NZS 4088.1、AS/NZS 4088.2、ISO 8191、BS 5852或California TB117-2013等標準測試。除非特定法律、項目規範或受監管用途將其強制化，否則這些標準屬於技術或合同路徑。

standards_or_laws: Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law
AS/NZS 4088.1 — Burning behaviour of upholstered furniture: smouldering ignition source (voluntary or buyer-specified unless incorporated)
AS/NZS 4088.2 — Burning behaviour of upholstered furniture: flaming ignition source (voluntary or buyer-specified unless incorporated)
ISO 8191 / BS 5852 / California TB117-2013 — possible buyer or project evidence routes, not national Australian mandatory standards for ordinary domestic furniture

summary.en: Chinese upholstered furniture suppliers may hold GB 17927-1 and GB 17927-2 ignitability reports, foam material certificates, and buyer-specific fire test reports. These may be technically useful, but they do not create a single Australian national mandatory flammability approval for ordinary domestic upholstered furniture.
summary.zh: 中国软垫家具供应商可能持有GB 17927-1和GB 17927-2可点燃性报告、泡沫材料证书及买方指定防火测试报告。这些资料在技术上可能有用，但并不形成普通家用软垫家具的单一澳大利亚全国强制阻燃批准。
summary.zht: 中國軟墊家具供應商可能持有GB 17927-1和GB 17927-2可點燃性報告、泡沫材料證書及買方指定防火測試報告。這些資料在技術上可能有用，但並不形成普通家用軟墊家具的單一澳洲全國強制阻燃批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 17927-1 — upholstered seating ignitability, smouldering cigarette
GB 17927-2 — upholstered seating ignitability, match flame equivalent
GB 28481 — safety technical requirements for furniture where applicable

gap.en: The gap is classification and buyer requirement management. Do not import the UK assumption into Australia. Confirm whether the product is ordinary domestic furniture, commercial furniture, hotel or aged-care furniture, public procurement, or a state/territory regulated use, then test to the buyer or applicable project standard if required.
gap.zh: 差距在于用途分类和买方要求管理。不要将英国规则假设套用于澳大利亚。应确认产品属于普通家用家具、商用家具、酒店或养老护理家具、公共采购，还是州/领地受监管用途；如有要求，再按买方或适用项目标准测试。
gap.zht: 差距在於用途分類和買方要求管理。不要將英國規則假設套用於澳洲。應確認產品屬於普通家用家具、商用家具、酒店或養老護理家具、公共採購，還是州/領地受監管用途；如有要求，再按買方或適用項目標準測試。

mandatory_status.target: No national mandatory UK-style upholstery flammability standard for ordinary domestic furniture; Australian Consumer Law general safety duties remain mandatory, and project or buyer specifications may require tests
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or buyer-driven depending on product category and China-market rule; GB 17927 reports are not automatically an Australian legal requirement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — KEY FLAG] Australia should not be treated like the UK for upholstered furniture fire safety. There is no single national mandatory domestic upholstery flammability regime equivalent to the UK Fire Safety Regulations, but Australian ACL safety duties and buyer/project standards can still require credible fire-performance evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考——重要提示】澳大利亚软垫家具防火合规不应按英国规则处理。澳大利亚没有等同于英国防火安全条例的全国性家用软垫家具强制阻燃制度，但澳大利亚消费者法安全义务及买方/项目标准仍可能要求可信的防火性能证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考——重要提示】澳洲軟墊家具防火合規不應按英國規則處理。澳洲沒有等同於英國防火安全條例的全國性家用軟墊家具強制阻燃制度，但澳洲消費者法安全義務及買方/項目標準仍可能要求可信的防火性能證據。
